comment_content:
Clearly, there are a bunch of Adam Sandler fans (weirdo Edition) people in the comments, but I'm gonna assume that these people are not even Adam Sandler fans. The movie was really good in my opinion it has nonsense pointless random humor because that is what comedy movies are but I feel it shows a maturity of Adam Sandler his self like yes there are random moments that are just people being childish because that's funny, but this made me laugh through and through I had stopped watching it for hours because whatever side I was watching it on kept freezing and came back and immediately started laughing at what was going on again it's just genuinely funny with a little bit of laugh at this because it's supposed to be funny of course but it's actually stand-alone funny for 99% of the film the writing is also very good. I'm putting it up there with that Eddie Murphy film something About America I don't remember the name but if you remember Eddie Murphy movies and remember the one where he's like a Prince from a other place then you know what I'm talking about the writing in those movies were very good and that's what makes this movie even better on top of just being a comedy it's just a comedy with good writing the story makes sense and even if I find myself questioning some stuff like that one guy being locked up over the golden jacket, I can just let that go because the rest of the film is just really good.

I don't want to follow the comments, but I feel it's absolutely necessary for me to give some key points to this movie that I absolutely enjoyed because of the extremely ridiculously negative comments about the movie

I like how that the adult Adam Sandler obviously in the movie has his daughter sort of taking care of him in terms of his alcoholism trying to get him to stay straight, but later on in the film he says I don't want you taking care of me and I slipped up I should be taking care of you guys

If you've seen the first one which honestly doesn't matter because I think that's just one movie I never watched, it has little clips of the old stuff, So you understand what they're talking about in the current movie 

Lastly, One of the best things that I like about this movie and this is purely personal because I have watched many movies that “fame stuff” But this movie had all the well-known actors that you could think of from many different time periods, but what I believe makes it good and acceptable and not a detriment to this movie is that these characters aren't representing as themselves specifically or any other common thing people would know them by and in some cases are pretending to be other characters which I find hilarious.

Do not be swayed by these negative comments because if you're truly an Adam Sandler's fan to the level you would be of an individual person It doesn't matter what they put out LOL Happy Madison is his own business so this is his movie And if you enjoyed the first one at the very least you're gonna enjoy the throwbacks to the 1st one and the 2nd one.
reply_content: I guess your easily pleased 😂
